concerns.text: FR-004 flags a summary as inconsistent when the absolute difference between reported and reconstructed p‑values exceeds 0.05. This fixed 0.05 threshold is arbitrary and not statistically justified (e.g., it does not account for the variance of p‑value estimates or the scale of p‑values near zero). Without a principled justification, the inconsistency detection may yield inflated false‑positive or false‑negative rates, undermining the scientific validity of the prevalence estimate.
